## ToolShare AWS v1.0.0

The first stable release of ToolShare AWS: a deployed, full-stack serverless
tool-rental marketplace whose application and infrastructure ship together.

### Highlights

- React/TypeScript marketplace served through private S3 and CloudFront
- Cognito-protected API Gateway/Lambda API backed by DynamoDB
- Step Functions checkout saga with payment-failure compensation
- SNS fanout, SQS FIFO/DLQ processing, and EventBridge analytics events
- CodePipeline staging-to-production delivery with smoke and manual gates
- CodeDeploy canary releases with CloudWatch-alarm rollback
- 41 backend tests, 9 frontend tests, CloudFormation lint, and a six-scenario
  Playwright browser journey

The release includes the production web build and its SHA-256 checksum. AWS
deployments remain exclusively owned by CodePipeline.
